meaning: n.火焰,光辉,情感爆发vi.燃烧,照耀,激发vt.在树皮上刻路标,公开宣布
examples: Some 4,000 firefighters are battling the blaze.
She fled from the blaze, coughing and spluttering.
Five people died in the blaze.
Hundreds of firefighters from across the United States are helping local departments battle the blaze.
I've seen the world and it sights in my day, cities that blaze like the sun.
